calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: P-comp: MECH-448 demotion x MECH-449 Go/No-Go composition at committed-class entropy (2x2 diagnostic)
items.note: conversion_ceiling_campaign:P-comp prong (prong map node P-comp; user decision 2026-06-22). 2x2 (use_f_eligibility_demotion {OFF,ON} x use_go_nogo_constitution {OFF,ON}) over a matched stack on the arc_062 GAP-B bank; swept variable = LEVER COMBINATION (NOT use_candidate_rule_field, which is a matched constant True). use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor (689e) + use_dacc + top_k shortlist scaffold + 643a authority/routing + MECH-341 + SD-056 + trained lateral_pfc bias head + matured CRF pool all matched constants. PRIMARY DV committed-class entropy (C2). Characterizes whether MECH-448 demotion and MECH-449 Go/No-Go COMPOUND or CANCEL when co-armed (Factor A x Factor B CANCELLED at 689a; this pair UNKNOWN). Per-arm conditional readiness: C1e demotion-live on demotion-armed arms (ARM_DEM/ARM_BOTH), C1f No-Go-live on gng-armed arms (ARM_GNG/ARM_BOTH). 3-way verdict levers_compound/levers_cancel/levers_neutral; readiness-unmet or bit-identical-arms self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; claim_ids=[MECH-448,MECH-449] context only (scoring-excluded); PROMOTES NOTHING. Re-derive-brake EXEMPT: tests lever COMPOSITION (distinct question), not a GAP-B same-lever letter, not a Factor-B test; both levers 0 substrate_ceiling autopsies + face-validated (689d/689g/689e PASS). Runnable now (built+face-validated levers only). Feeds conversion_ceiling_campaign:FULLSTACK composition-readiness gate. validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms end-to-end, exit 0, toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready as designed).
